generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - our country's been relying too much on foreign tech for critical infrastructure. Remember when the power grid went down last winter? That could've been avoided if we had our own secure systems. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation, it's about being prepared. #NationalSecurityFirst #ThinkLocalFirst
